```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.95em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:0.95em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.2em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">start here</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Standalone</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#3DA18A;">1 file</span>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li>· one <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.05em 0.35em;border-radius:4px;">SKILL.md</code></li>
    <li>· quick &amp; self-contained</li>
    <li>· where most start</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);position:relative;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:0.95em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C4881A,#FFB84D);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.2em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">graduate to</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Plugin</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;">3+ skills</span>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li>· bundles skills + MCPs + hooks</li>
    <li>· for team distribution</li>
    <li>· when 3–4 belong together</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
